# cortexcloud_compliance_standard (Data Source)

Provides details about a Compliance Standard.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cortexcloud_compliance_standard" "existing" {
  id = "std-123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the compliance standard.

### Read-Only

- `assessments_profiles_count` (Number) The number of assessment profiles using this standard.
- `controls_ids` (Set of String) The set of control IDs associated with this standard.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the standard.
- `created_date` (String) The creation date of the standard.
- `description` (String) The description of the compliance standard.
- `insert_ts` (Number) The insertion timestamp.
- `is_custom` (Boolean) Whether the standard is custom.
- `labels` (Set of String) The set of labels for this standard.
- `modify_ts` (Number) The modification timestamp.
- `name` (String) The name of the compliance standard.
- `publisher` (String) The publisher of the standard.
- `release_date` (String) The release date of the standard.
- `revision` (Number) The revision number of the standard.
- `version` (String) The version of the compliance standard.
